input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.10.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.10.5
            TITLE: the international electrical symbol  (a red spark on a white edged blue triangle) must be near

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.10.5: The international electrical symbol  (a red spark on a white edged blue triangle) must be near
EV.7.10.5 The international electrical symbol  (a red spark on a white edged blue triangle) must be near 
each Shutdown Button.

final_answer: The international electrical symbol (a red spark on a white edged blue triangle) must be near each Shutdown Button.
